author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 6 COMPLETE. 4/4 subissues closed. 40 GPU tests on RTX 3090. Implemented: GpuDevice (cudarc 0.19.3), CudaBuffer, CudaAllocator (memory tracking), 5 PTX elementwise kernels (add/sub/mul/neg/relu on sm_52), GpuTensor bridge (CPU<->GPU transfer, shape-preserving ops), f32 PTX fast path + f64 CPU fallback. Deferred: cuBLAS matmul (needs CUDA toolkit), cuDNN conv, autocast/GradScaler GPU path.
